<!-- Thanks for contributing to AI Workforce! One app per PR keeps review fast.
     Reviewers score against the rubric in REVIEWING.md — self-check below. -->

## What are you adding or changing?

- **App / change:**
- **File(s):** `departments/<name>/README.md` or `industries/<name>/README.md`
- **This is my own project:** yes / no  <!-- disclosure — it's fine, just say so -->

## The bar (reviewers check every box — see [REVIEWING.md](../REVIEWING.md#the-bar))

- [ ] **AI-native** — an LLM / AI agent / ML model is at the core (not a legacy app with an AI add-on)
- [ ] **Open source** with a real license (source-available is flagged in the card)
- [ ] **Self-hostable**, and shippable in ~a day or less
- [ ] Repo link resolves; **star count is real** (not inflated)
- [ ] "Why it's on the list" is **honest** about rough edges
- [ ] Uses the exact **card format** from `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No affiliate links or paid placement

## For a new department / industry or a flagship app (needs 2 approvals)

- [ ] Seeded with 3+ verified AI-native tools
- [ ] Added to the index and the README count where relevant
